about_text:
Sakari is a former European Champion Powerlifter, two-time British Powerlifting Champion, and previous gym owner in London. Now based in the South of France, her practice as an artist has evolved from six years of deep inner enquiry and extended periods of silence.

Painting emerged during this time as a vital form of expression—an intuitive process through which deeply felt emotions could surface and become visible. Her Indian cultural roots, interwoven with her life in the UK and France, infuse her work with great richness and diversity. 

Sakari primarily uses watercolour, in addition to acrylic and oil pastels applied spontaneously. Her paintings are created without preconception. Each work unfolds organically, as the paint is allowed to lead, revealing what wishes to come through. This open process mirrors her inner journey—one rooted in self-enquiry, stillness, and surrender to the unknown.

 As Sakari’s inner state now feels beyond language, painting has become the space where this ineffable state finds form. Her work explores the tensions between life and death, reality and memory, and the material world and what lies beyond it.

 Sakari’s art is recognised for its depth, sensitivity, and intuitive resonance. Through her paintings, she invites the viewer into a quiet contemplation. For Sakari, painting is a raw, natural, and deeply emotional act—an expression that feels both pure and alive.
privacy_policy_intro: This privacy policy explains how Sakari De-Meis collects, uses, and protects the personal information you provide when using her website and services. By creating an account, making a purchase, or signing up for her newsletter, you agree to the terms described in this policy.
privacy_policy_info: We collect information you provide directly to us, including: full name, email address, shipping address, billing address, phone number, order history, and account preferences. We also automatically collect limited technical data such as your IP address, browser type, and pages visited on this website to help us improve your experience on our site.
privacy_policy_payment: We do not store, process, or have access to your payment card details. All payment transactions are handled securely by Braintree, a certified third-party payment provider. Please refer to their privacy policy for details on how your payment data is handled.
privacy_policy_use: We use your personal information solely to operate our store and serve you. Specifically, to: Process and fulfill your orders, send order confirmations and updates, manage your account, send newsletters (if subscribed), respond to support requests, and improve our website.
privacy_policy_sharing: We do not sell, rent, trade, or otherwise share your personal information with any third parties for marketing or commercial purposes. The only exception is sharing strictly necessary data with service providers who help us operate (e.g. delivery couriers who need your shipping address, or the payment processor). These parties are contractually required to keep your data secure and may only use it for the specific purpose of fulfilling your order.
privacy_policy_newsletter: If you subscribe to our newsletter, we collect and store your email address for the purpose of sending you updates, promotions, and news about our store. You can unsubscribe at any time by clicking the 'unsubscribe' link in any email or by contacting us directly. We will remove your email from our mailing list promptly.
privacy_policy_data: We retain your account and order information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. If you request account deletion, we will remove your personal data within 30 days, except where we are legally required to retain certain records (e.g. financial/tax records).
privacy_policy_rights: You have the right to: access your personal data, correct inaccurate data, request data deletion, withdraw consent (newsletter), and data portability. To exercise any of these rights, contact us via the contact form on https://www.sakaridemeis.com/contact.
privacy_policy_cookies: We use essential cookies to keep your shopping cart working and to keep you logged in. You can disable cookies in your browser settings, though this may affect site functionality.
privacy_policy_security: If you have questions about this privacy policy or your personal data, please reach out via the contact form on https://www.sakaridemeis.com/contact.
